description: The AvatarPoseSmoothLerp component changes the smoothing speed of the position and rotation of a BodyNode.

fields.PositionSmoothSpeed: how fast the body node should move. Lower values mean slower speed.
fields.RotationSmoothSpeed: how fast the body node should rotate. Lower values mean slower speed.
fields.SmoothSimulatedPoses: Whether this filter should smooth limbs affected by the procedural animation system.

usage: For use with a AvatarAnchor or a tooltip to smooth the hand movement.
